name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: We need wonks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We have a special new group for you | Friend --

In an election that has often seemed like it’s about anything but policy -- Donald Trump seems to prefer name-calling and empty slogans -- I’m proud that Hillary is a bona fide policy buff. Earlier this week, she even proudly declared the policies on our campaign's website to be “a little wonky,” and then she told us why that’s important to her:

“I actually sweat the specifics because they matter,” she said. “Whether one more kid gets health care may just be a detail in Washington -- but it’s all that matters to that family worrying about their child.”

Hillary thinks carefully about how best to solve the problems facing American families, and she’s not afraid to get in the weeds to figure out which policies will really make a difference.

If you’re a policy nerd like Hillary, we’d love to invite you to a special new group: Wonks for Hillary.**[Add your name now to be one of the first to join, and we’ll keep you updated on key policy rollouts throughout the campaign -- and even invite you to join exclusive calls with policy advisors like me.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MjA4MjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzNjUzMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) **

>From health care expansion to investing in our infrastructure to gun violence prevention, Hillary has specific plans that dive deep into the root causes of these issues, and propose smart, targeted fixes that will implement changes people can really see and feel in their communities.

We’re running against a dangerous opponent whose policy ideas include legalizing torture and banning immigrants based on their religion. Hillary is going to keep fighting him the best way she knows how: by rolling out plans that will actually help Americans. When you join Wonks for Hillary, you’ll be able to talk articulately about those plans to anyone who’s interested -- and learn in-depth exactly how Hillary will help Americans as our next president.

**Add your name to join Wonks for Hillary today:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MjA4MjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzNjUzMjI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- talk to you soon!

Jacob

Jacob Leibenluft
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

|

subject: Saturday Blitz: Have you signed up?

body:
This Saturday, all across Indiana, Hoosiers like you will be coming together for a statewide campaign blitz to help get things back on track for our state.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5711993249326303232/-551269241017989120?utm_campaign=acq_SBlitz_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&ms=em16160624acqSBlitzgq&refcode=em16160624acqSBlitzgq)

Peter, Tomorrow, all across Indiana, Hoosiers like you will be coming together for a statewide campaign blitz to help get things back on track for our state. We'll be talking with neighbors at their front porches and on the phone about how John and Christina will move things forward for all of our families. [**So many of you already stepped up, but we still have key shifts to fill in crucial precincts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5711993249326303232/-551269241017989120?utm_campaign=acq_SBlitz_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&ms=em16160624acqSBlitzgq&refcode=em16160624acqSBlitzgq) We have morning and afternoon volunteer shifts this Saturday in Bloomington, Brownsburg, Carmel, East Chicago, Evansville, Fort Wayne, Indianapolis, Merrillville, and South Bend. [**Sign up online today and pick your meeting location.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5711993249326303232/-551269241017989120?utm_campaign=acq_SBlitz_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&ms=em16160624acqSBlitzgq&refcode=em16160624acqSBlitzgq) We'll follow up with with all the details you need to get involved. | | [**Find your volunteer location ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5711993249326303232/-551269241017989120?utm_campaign=acq_SBlitz_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&ms=em16160624acqSBlitzgq&refcode=em16160624acqSBlitzgq)

**For those of you who have never volunteered on a political campaign before,** have no fear: we have trained leaders and staff who will equip you with everything you need to be successful, in a variety of different roles. We're so excited for this Saturday, and can't wait to see you.
[**RSVP today >> GreggForGovernor.com/Saturday-Victory-Blitz**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5711993249326303232/-551269241017989120?utm_campaign=acq_SBlitz_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&ms=em16160624acqSBlitzgq&refcode=em16160624acqSBlitzgq)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Why I'm running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
I have decided to seek reelection to the United States Senate. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)
---
Friend,

I know it's unusual in politics to hear someone say they've changed their mind. Well, I'm not afraid to say it.

**I am running for re-election for Senate in Florida, and I hope I'll have your support.**

[**Yes, Marco! You can count on me!
Chip in Now >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)

I changed my mind because the stakes are too high this year. No matter who wins this presidential election, the Senate's role in checking whatever bad ideas come out of the White House is critical to the future of our nation.

I want to continue my work in the Senate and be there to ensure only ideas & policies that will invigorate our nation and our citizens are passed.

This campaign is not going to be easy. **Election Day is less than 150 days away** , and I need to reach every Florida voter well before then with my conservative and strong security message. Not to mention the Democrats have a leg up on us because they have been raising money for this campaign for over a year and we have been running for just about 48 hours.

The money we raise this week, our first week, is absolutely critical to our success. My opponent and the national Democrats are going to view the money we raise as a barometer of our strength.

**[So, Friend, will you stand with me in this first week of our campaign?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)** **

[**Yes, Marco! You can count on me!
Chip in Now >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)

No matter where in the country you live, this election in Florida will impact you. The balance of the Senate rests on winning this seat, so every dollar you can contribute will make an impact.

**Your inaugural donation to my campaign will ensure we can run a winning campaign and guarantee our victory this fall.**

Thank you for your commitment to our country and our future.

Marco Rubio

**P.S. November 8th will be here before we know it, and we have limited time to raise the money needed to win this race.[Your donation, no matter the size will make an impact on my campaign. Please contribute whatever you are able to right now by following this secure online donation link. Thank you for your support.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)**

[**DONATE >>>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36087174:sQ1LKHY7N:m:1:1328517760:0C10EB962584B8A250EBB38D8D1585D1:r)

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016

subject: Fwd: My friend Mike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence for Indiana
body:
Senator Coats emailed you yesterday, and I wanted to make sure you got the chance to hear what he has to say about Mike and what he’s done for Indiana
---
| Friend,

Senator Coats emailed you yesterday, and I wanted to make sure you got the chance to hear what he has to say about Mike and what he’s done for Indiana.

Indiana has been a target of the far-left from the beginning. They know that our commonsense, solutions-based reforms are working, and they want to turn back the clock by implementing their radical progressive agenda.

But with our quarterly deadline due in just a few days, this is the perfect opportunity to fight back. **We’re aiming to raise $45,000 by the end of June to stock our campaign with the tools necessary to defend our record against their baseless attacks.**

[**Will you help us fight back against John Gregg and his liberal allies by contributing $20 to re-elect Mike today?**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/9774d1b5a0ad48009cfceced761d0297?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_amount_1&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b)

They may have big, out-of-state, special-interest donors on their side, but our campaign is fueled by real Hoosiers like you. Let’s show them that Indiana is committed to moving forward – [**contribute $20 today.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/0035fda08a4148d08ea46baa329df82c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_amount_2&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b)

Thank you,
Matt Huckleby

On Thu, Jun 23, 2016 at 7:00 AM, Dan Coats <[communications@mikepence.com](http://links.mikepence.com/u/33b72885f9854053a55af684bb459458?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_header_email&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b)> sent: |
| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/545e9b18a4b64d1c960107ad7b132125?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b) |
| Friend,

While in office, I have focused on cutting wasteful spending, reducing the national debt, and promoting a pro-growth economic policy to put Hoosiers and Americans back to work.

On a national level, we have not accomplished nearly as much as I would like, but I continue to be impressed by the progress and growth occurring in Indiana – **thanks in large part to having an ally in Governor Mike Pence.**

Mike has truly been a leader for Indiana that has helped the state grow and continue on the path forward to more jobs, more economic opportunity, and more prosperity for all Hoosier families.

In just a few days, Mike is facing a tough deadline – the first big one of the general election. At the end of June, they have to close their books on the 2nd quarter fundraising numbers and release it to the public. [**It would mean a lot to me and it would mean even more to the Pence team if you could contribute $20 today to help my friend Mike get past this deadline.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/739bd914a2a8429e8f009b4934073af8?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b)

**We need Mike to continue his commonsense, conservative legacy here in Indiana, and with your help we can do it.[Contribute to Team Pence today.](http://links.mikepence.com/u/ea10a093e9e84aabbb95987ee7bc0b11?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160624-fwd-my-friend-mike-3611-direct-b)**

Thank you,
Dan Coats |

body:
He's not telling the full truth. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf435c/1c469400/6ec8b96/356afea/4211595580/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&refcode=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&utm_campaign=eoq2&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- On Wednesday, Senator Ron Johnson released his newest TV ad. In the ad, he's walking around a factory. He's wearing safety glasses. He's pointing at machines. But there's one major thing missing: **Any mention of his actual job in the U.S. Senate**. The job where he's spent the past five years as a stooge for the Koch brothers and right-wing special interest groups. Fortunately, Russ has a new ad up on the airwaves, too -- and it's pretty straightforward. It captures what Russ has been doing since we launched this campaign: crisscrossing the state and listening to Wisconsinites. **[Russ's newest ad will be competing for airtime with Senator Johnson's misleading ad -- if we want to go toe-to-toe, it's critical that we reach our new end-of-quarter goal of raising $250,000. Can we count on you to contribute $5?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf435c/1c469400/6ec8b96/356afea/4211595580/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&refcode=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&utm_campaign=eoq2&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf435c/1c469400/6ec8b96/356afea/4211595580/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&refcode=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&utm_campaign=eoq2&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf435c/1c469400/6ec8b96/356afea/4211595580/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&refcode=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&utm_campaign=eoq2&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf435c/1c469400/6ec8b96/356afeb/4211595580/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&refcode=ema_2016-06-23_eoq2_ad_win&utm_campaign=eoq2&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Tom Russell

body:
| | | Your Campaign Update
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=699a18af39&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| In a week filled with meetings, events and policy discussions, Phil even made time to help a motorist in need on the side of the highway! All in a weeks’ work for Phil and Team Scott. A few more of this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign are below.

**VOTE FOR PHIL NOW! – EARLY PRIMARY VOTING IS NOW OPEN!**

Don’t forget early voting for the August 9 primary **is now open in all towns**. Check in with your town clerk’s office to learn more (find yours [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4f7e781681&e=19cebfe173)) and **get out the vote for Phil**. Your support has kept us going throughout this campaign and Phil needs you now more than ever to make sure we send a clear message about the type of campaign Vermonters deserve - one on the issues, not slinging mud! So let’s get every vote we can! Please, go vote at your town clerk’s office ASAP!

**BUT DON’T STOP THERE – GET 5 MORE EARLY VOTES!**
After you vote, you can help make sure Phil wins – and reject the smear campaign of our opponent – on August 9th by getting 5 more family members and friends to vote early. It would be a **HUGE** contribution to the campaign.
***
**THE BURLINGTON FREE PRESS REPORTS PHIL IS “THE ANTI-SHUMLIN”**
Phil is **a leader who always listens and learns** , never over promises and **does what he says he’ll do**. He’s a leader that works together with others to identify and implement the solutions. And he’s a leader who believes **“my first duty is to my constituents.”**

That is exactly the kind of leadership Vermonters need in their next Governor and that is the kind of leader Phil will be, as detailed by the Burlington Free Press this week.

Reporter Jess Aloe hit the campaign trail with Phil and Team Scott, seeing first hand Phil’s grassroots campaign strategy and commitment to meeting with, and listening to Vermonters. Phil shared his vision for Vermont and discussed his approach to addressing some of our biggest challenges. He also addressed his leadership style: **“I want to know the plan and I want to have it all laid out. I don’t make promises I can’t keep or don’t intend to keep,”** Phil told the Free Press.

Supporters and colleagues agreed. Governor Jim Douglas shared more on **Phil’s career-long commitment to efficiency** – a commitment that will guide his policies as Governor. His colleagues on both sides of the aisle also noted that **Phil’s fairness, ability to understand what Vermont needs and his dedication to listening to his constituents had earned their respect and support**. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8c9a3647e8&e=19cebfe173).
***
**PHIL ON THE ISSUES**
Phil also sat down with Vermont Public Radio this week to share his perspective on issues, and how he’ll address those issues while ensuring our economy remains the top priority. As Phil told Jane Lindholm on Vermont Edition, **_when we “focus on the economy and grow revenues organically, we don’t have to raise taxes and fees.”_** Phil also shared his frustration and concern by the lack of focus on pro-growth, pro-jobs policies during the last legislative biennium – despite his urging lawmakers to make that the priority. He also explained that **“we should be setting parameters when we build a budget,” and that just like we do for our personal and business expenses, state government needs to evaluate “do I want it, or do I need it?”** Listen to the full interview on VPR [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=18a9a605dd&e=19cebfe173).

Phil also shared his plans and approach to addressing environmental challenges at the Vermont Conservation Voters forum. As Phil noted, **protecting our environment is critical and environmental issues are linked closely to the strength of the economy**. View the entire forum [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4f47201b2b&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ON THE ROAD AGAIN**
Residents of **Barre** , **Essex** , **Fair Haven** and **Rutland** welcomed Phil this week at _Meet and Greets_ that gave Phil the chance to learn more about the issues facing Vermonters in each region. Team Scott **fired up the grill at Jack Corse Fuels** before stopping by the **Marble Mansion** and enjoying some **ice cream at** **Tozier’s**. Phil was also honored to help the Vermont State Police celebrate its awards ceremony in recognition of the amazing officers that serve us everyday.
Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
Next week we’re visiting with the [Professional Fire Fighters of Vermont](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=946746377e&e=19cebfe173), participating in the [Brattleboro Chamber Forum](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2d27052dd3&e=19cebfe173), and appearing on [Falls Area Community Television](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b89bf911c9&e=19cebfe173). Check out our full listing of events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=aefc957444&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Public service is about serving Vermonters_**
“[The Statehouse] is the people’s house. It’s their house and we’re there to serve Vermonters...We have an obligation to breakdown barriers and try to serve Vermonters the best that we are able to." (Source: Middlebury Five-O: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=49d516cfb2&e=19cebfe173))

**_Addressing environmental challenges_**
“If we don't start revitalizing our economy, we're not going to have money to continue to put into programs that are important such as this lake cleanup.” (Source: Fox 44: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=328104627a&e=19cebfe173))

**_Thanking those that serve bravely_**
“Scott thanked the troopers for their service. ‘It’s a simple phrase, but it stands for so much,’ Scott said.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bb42eed105&e=19cebfe173)) ***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Michael Diender in Stowe Reporter: To Protect its tourism business, Vermont has to step up_**
Vermont has a powerful brand thanks to our beautiful state, rich culture, and our small businesses and entrepreneurs that produce unique, quality products, services and experiences. Phil has proposed strengthening and better promoting that brand as part of his plan to grow our population, bolstering our workforce and strengthening our economy (read more [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c9cbae8ee5&e=19cebfe173)). He’ll work to more strategically and aggressively market Vermont to attract more tourists, new residents and new businesses. Stowe business owner Michael Diender details the importance a more cohesive, strategic marketing effort for the state, providing an interesting read on what more can be done. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=57f15d3c13&e=19cebfe173).

Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6b42d0ac14&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=77cf9afbb0&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

Earlier this year, I cast my very first vote as a U.S. citizen -- I voted for Hillary in the New York primary. I voted for Hillary for many reasons, but in particular, I thought about the future of immigrant and Latino families and Hillary's commitment to making our lives better. When Ted Kennedy introduced immigration legislation in the Senate, he had only two co-sponsors: Hillary was one.

After yesterday’s devastating Supreme Court decision that puts millions of immigrant families at risk of being torn apart, I know more than ever how important it is for Hillary to win this election.

Donald Trump wants to blame people like me for our country’s problems. To him we aren't real Americans. He calls us criminals and rapists. He says we need a wall to keep us out -- and he’s not the only one who thinks that.

You want proof of Trump's support? The Republicans say Trump’s backers have chipped in $5 million online this week alone to back up his vile ideas.

I hope you can help me prove today that Hillary’s way of doing things is the right way. That our nation is stronger when we all help each other and rise together. That we are capable of building a loving, inclusive campaign -- and a campaign strong enough to beat Trump this November.

**We’re just six days away from a major fundraising deadline -- will you chip in $1 now to show Trump and the world that we're just as committed as his supporters?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzA1NTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzNzk4NTI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: They took their country back
body:
UK voters took a brave stand yesterday. I could not be more proud to stand with them in their fight for freedom and independence.
| | |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11c0pFubA0lbhYFEzwdSpCs7e) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

Last night UK voters shocked the world.

I'm sure you saw the news, Peter. Voters in the United Kingdom chose to leave the flawed and failing European Union and reassert control over their borders, politics and economy, _taking a brave stand for freedom and independence_. It's been dubbed "Brexit" in the media.

These voters stood up for their nation - they put the United Kingdom first, _and they took their country back_.

**With your help, we're going to do the _exact same thing_ on Election Day 2016 here in the United States of America**.

I am fighting to upend the failed Big Government status quo in Washington, so that Americans can start believing in the future of our country again. And if elected President of the United States, I will strengthen our ties with a free and independent Britain.

[**Will you stand with me at this critical time?**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11c0tEPx0JGGfXpQr5Ce8B4cP)

Yesterday UK voters exercised their right to self-determination for all the world to see. And today, our friends across the Atlantic are looking forward to a return to greater freedom and a better future for their children and grandchildren.

Voters here face the same choice on Election Day.

Peter, the political elites didn't see this coming. Wall Street and the media didn't have a clue. _And they want to believe just as badly that we cannot win in November_.

**Let's send another shockwave around the world**. Let's take back our country from the corrupt career politicians and put Americans first. Let's re-declare our independence.

[**Please stand with me today to reclaim freedom from the corrupt Washington establishment and Make America Great Again**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11c0xEaSrt2bdWa2iF0zRzGiq).

Thank you.

Best Wishes,
[](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11c0BDwdScnGbUUeaeoVAyio1)
Donald J. Trump
Candidate for President of the United States

It's been dubbed "Brexit" in the media. These voters stood up for their nation - they put the United Kingdom first, and they took their country back.
